response.justification: Candidate lacks all three mandatory requirements: minimal C++ experience (6 months documented in 2014-15, no Windows platform mention), no SQL Server/Oracle expertise (background is MongoDB and web-based systems), and no fixed-income or capital-markets domain knowledge. While the resume demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and full-stack capability, the career trajectory is web/mobile/data-focused, fundamentally misaligned with capital-markets systems development.
strengths: Proven ability to optimize high-throughput systems and write low-latency applications (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second)
Strong testing discipline, TDD practices, and CI/CD infrastructure knowledge with demonstrated mentoring capability
Some financial-services exposure from RIDE Capital investment role, plus demonstrated adaptability across multiple technology stacks
concerns: Only 6 months of documented C++ experience (2014-15), with zero mention of Windows platform development—both mandatory requirements
No SQL Server or Oracle expertise; primary database background is MongoDB (NoSQL), not relational systems
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain expertise; single vague reference to investment practices insufficient for mandatory domain requirement
